channel.title: Boss Kev Curated Newsfeed
channel.description: Curated Malaysia, global, and tech headlines.

item.title: Pass on the discount to your customers, FT minister tells gyms after 80pc licence fee cut
item.description:
Source: Malay Mail (Malaysia)
KUALA LUMPUR, March 3 — Gym operators in the capital are encouraged to channel the benefits of the 80 per cent red...

item.description:
Source: Malay Mail (Malaysia)
PUTRAJAYA, March 3 — More than 1,000 individuals nationwide have been arrested and subjected to Community Service...

item.title: Drones hit fuel tank at Oman port, says state media
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
The attack is the second on the port in three days, as Iran broadens its targets in the Gulf.

item.title: Welfare dept seeks mother who left baby girl at Seberang Jaya hospital
item.description:
Source: Malay Mail (Malaysia)
BUKIT MERTAJAM, March 3 — The Seberang Perai Tengah Social Welfare Department (JKM) Office is seeking the biologic...

item.title: Woman allegedly assaulted, threatened by acquaintance in Sentul
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
Sentul police chief Basri Sagoni says the suspect also allegedly forced the woman to engage in an unwanted sexual act at the same location.

item.title: Can Bills be drafted better before tabling in Parliament? Kula says improvements underway
item.description:
Source: Malay Mail (Malaysia)
KUALA LUMPUR, March 3 — The government is giving high priority to improving the drafting of Bills to ensure greate...

item.title: France says it will work with China on de-esclatating Iran war
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
Both countries' foreign ministers are committed to a political solution that guarantees collective security while considering the aspirations of the Iranian people.

item.title: Video: Top Democrat says there was no imminent threat to the US from Iran
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
US Democratic senator Mark Warner says there was no “imminent threat” from Iran to the US.

item.title: Tak hadir undi RUU, Ahli Parlimen Libaran masuk hospital, Saravanan ke upacara agama
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
Fahmi Fadzil jelaskan ketiadaan beberapa Ahli Parlimen untuk undi RUU had tempoh jawatan PM semalam.

item.title: Drone strikes blamed on Iran hit Iranian Kurdish camp in Iraq
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
Three Iranian drones targeted the Azadi camp, which belongs to Iranian Kurdish opposition parties in the district, says official.

item.description:
Source: Malay Mail (Malaysia)

item.title: Trump says US-UK relationship ‘not like it used to be’
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
US President Donald Trump is unhappy after Britain refused US use of its Cyprus base for operations against Iran.

item.title: Berang bayi menangis, lelaki tumbuk teman wanita hingga lebam
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
Polis giat mengesan suspek yang masih bebas bagi membantu siasatan.

item.title: US Speaker says US had to attack Iran after Israel did
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
Senior US Republican Mike Johnson told reporters the US had to attack Iran to protect US interests.

item.title: MSF official recounts how worker was ‘obliterated’ at Gaza bus stop
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
Simon Eccleshall of Doctors Without Borders tells of the psychological impact humanitarian workers suffer from the death of colleagues.

item.title: Tiada negeri milik mutlak mana-mana parti, PKR ingatkan Sanusi
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
Timbalan Ketua PKR Kedah Dr Taufiq Johari berkata rakyat akan menilai prestasi dan keikhlasan pemimpin, bukan sindiran politik.

item.title: Two Perak Education Dept officers claim trial to RM4,000 bribery charges
item.description:
Source: Malay Mail (Malaysia)

item.title: Is the US arming Mexican cartels?
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
Eighty percent of weapons seized from Mexican cartels come from the US, according to Mexico’s defence minister.

item.title: Fi lesen gimnasium di KL dikurangkan 80%
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
Kadar obesiti 'membimbangkan', menteri Wilayah Persekutuan gesa pengusaha gimnasium tawar diskaun luar waktu puncak dan untuk warga emas.

item.title: Gold retreats as firmer dollar offsets geopolitical safe-haven support
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
Meanwhile, investors assessed the impact of an escalating US and Israeli air war against Iran.

item.title: Wanita tanam bayi didenda RM4,000
item.description:

Kui Chai Hui mengaku salah menyembunyikan kelahiran bayi pramatang ketika usia kandungan tujuh bulan pada 28 Jan.

item.title: Libaran MP in hospital, Saravanan was attending prayers, says Fahmi
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
The government's spokesman explains absence of some MPs at yesterday's vote to limit the prime minister's tenure.

item.title: The French village where Ayatollah Khomeini fomented Iran’s revolution
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
Ayatollah Ruhollah Khomeini organised the whole Iranian revolution from Neauphle-le-Chateau, says neighbour.

item.title: How villagers along the Tenom–Pangi route stopped a runaway train in Sabah

Source: Malay Mail (Malaysia)

item.title: Terengganu pertimbang rayuan lanjut operasi pusat hiburan, karaoke

Exco Wan Sukairi Wan Abdullah berkata, pengusaha terbabit akan dipanggil berbincang agar kata sepakat dapat dicapai.

item.title: KL gym licence fees cut by 80% to tackle obesity
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
With KL’s obesity rate 'worryingly high', federal territories minister calls on gym operators to offer off-peak and senior discounts.

item.title: LIAM Alleges Average Medical Insurance Claim Only RM12,000
item.description:
Source: CodeBlue (Malaysia Health)
In defending the RM100k annual limit under the Base MHIT plan, LIAM claims that the average medical claim is only RM12,000, even though many ITOs in the insurance industry regularly tout policies with RM1m or higher annual limits for medical emergencies. The post LIAM Alleges Average Medical Insurance Claim Only RM12,000 appeared first on CodeBlue .

item.title: Call 997 right away if you suspect a scam, Fahmi tells Malaysians
item.description:
Source: Malay Mail (Malaysia)

item.title: Pakistanis at remote border describe scramble to leave Iran
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
Dozens of Pakistani nationals, including students, have crossed back into Pakistan via Taftan in Balochistan province.

item.title: US claims destroyed IRGC command centre, more Israel attacks on Tehran
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
The US Central Command (CENTCOM) says it destroyed air defence installations as well as missile and drone launch sites.

item.title: No evacuation plan yet as Gulf situation remains under control, says Tok Mat
item.description:
Source: Malay Mail (Malaysia)

item.title: Bersatu sees wing, division issues resolved within a week
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
Youth chief Hilman Idham says the party is performing well and actively working to strengthen itself.

item.title: Keadaan di Timur Tengah terkawal, belum perlu pelan evakuasi, kata Tok Mat
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today

item.title: Strong quake hits off Indonesia’s Sumatra island
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
The quake originated offshore from Sumatra's northeastern tip, but there was no tsunami risk.

item.title: Takiyuddin apologises for linking maritime op to Memali incident
item.description:

Dewan Rakyat speaker accepts the PN chief whip's apology after he admits his error.

item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
Satriano's superb volley gives the visitors a 1-0 win at the Santiago Bernabeu as Real miss injured forward Mbappe.

Hilman Idham berkata program rancak dilaksanakan ketika Ramadan khususnya untuk memperkukuhkan parti dan jentera pilihan raya.

Discussions centred on a global campaign in a number of countries, ex-PKR veep adds.

item.title: TM tegaskan penamatan perjanjian 5G sah walau dipertikai DNB
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
Telekom Malaysia berkata ia melaksanakan hak kontraktualnya di bawah perjanjian dengan mematuhi sepenuhnya syarat khusus berhubung penamatan awal.

item.title: US State Department orders ‘non-emergency’ staff to leave
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
The US State Department has updated its travel advisory on X amid the escalating conflict following US and Israeli strikes on Iran.

item.title: Situation in Gulf states under control, says Mohamad
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
Foreign minister says there is no need for an evacuation plan to bring Malaysians home from affected countries.

item.title: Parlimen terima permohonan maaf Takiyuddin kait APMM peristiwa Memali
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
Speaker Johari Abdul memutuskan berlaku kekhilafan dalam isu itu dan Takiyuddin Hassan sudah membuat memohon maaf mengenainya.

item.title: How Russia could benefit from the US-Israeli war on Iran
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
A protracted conflict in the Middle East could help Russia's war effort in Ukraine.

item.title: What we know on day four of US-Israeli attacks on Iran
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
Washington says 'harder hits' are still to come, as Tehran retaliates by closing the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: TM asserts termination of 5G deal valid after DNB disputes exit
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
Telekom Malaysia says it exercised its contractual rights under the agreement in strict compliance with the specific terms laid out.

item.title: Malaysian among two dead in Philippines helicopter crash
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
The Bell 505 helicopter made a forced landing in a small town in Rizal province after its engines were about to shut down.

item.title: Israel strikes Lebanon’s Beirut again; Hezbollah launches drones at Israel
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
The Israeli army says it is striking Hezbollah targets as its raids cause mass displacement in Lebanon.

item.title: Asia’s stock markets plunge amid US-Israeli conflict with Iran
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
Asian stocks rack up steep losses after Wall Street shrugs off risks of widening conflict.

Source: Malay Mail (Malaysia)

item.description:
Source: Malay Mail (Malaysia)
KUALA LUMPUR, March 3 — The constitutional amendment to separate the roles of the attorney general (AG) and public...

item.title: Malaysia Is Running Out Of Caregivers And Time — Rashidi Yahaya
item.description:
Source: CodeBlue (Malaysia Health)
Malaysia requires a long-term care insurance framework that spreads risk across the population and creates a sustainable financing pool, built before the demographic wave hits full force, not after. The post Malaysia Is Running Out Of Caregivers And Time — Rashidi Yahaya appeared first on CodeBlue .

item.title: Hamzah confirms talks to take over 'Parti Keluarga Malaysia'
item.description:
Source: Malaysiakini (EN News)
Negotiations still at technical stage, says Larut MP.

item.title: Nepal’s Gen Z threw out old parties. Will it vote for them in key election?
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
Last year's protests reflected popular disenchantment with established political parties, which are again seeking power.

item.title: Anwar quizzed on double standards after PKR accused of lobbying US against Najib
item.description:
Source: Malaysiakini (EN News)

item.title: As bombing continues, Israel’s war aim in Iran becomes clear: Regime change
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
Israel aims for regime change in Iran, but may not care as much about whether the transition is smooth.

item.title: Who is Ali Larijani, the Iranian official promising a ‘lesson’ to the US?
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
Ali Larijani is often viewed as a pragmatist and has an important role following the killing of Khamenei.

Source: Malay Mail (Malaysia)

item.description:

item.description:
Source: Malay Mail (Malaysia)
KUALA LUMPUR, March 3 — Prime Minister Datuk Seri Anwar Ibrahim alleged today that the supposed plot to destabilis...

item.title: Student charged with Quran desecration, posting offensive content
item.description:
Source: Malaysiakini (EN News)
Sessions Court sets RM10k bail for both charges.

item.title: Health PSSC Moots Expansion Of Insurance Coverage For Mental Health Services
item.description:
Source: CodeBlue (Malaysia Health)
The Health PSSC recommends expanding insurance coverage for mental health services, warning that limited coverage is pushing patients to pay out of pocket and straining public hospitals. Preventive care remains largely excluded from insurance. The post Health PSSC Moots Expansion Of Insurance Coverage For Mental Health Services appeared first on CodeBlue .

item.title: PARLIAMENT | AG-PP bill postponed; Hamzah says Anwar wants to vet international media
item.description:
Source: Malaysiakini (EN News)
What’s going on in Parliament today, with updates at 11.30am and 1.30pm.

item.title: Shutdown of Hormuz Strait raises fears of soaring oil prices
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
Consumers are set to pay higher prices, but US producers could benefit, analysts say.

item.title: Israeli attacks kill dozens of people across Lebanon
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
Israeli attacks on Lebanon have killed more than 50 people. It says the strikes are a response to Hezbollah rockets.

item.title: US Embassy in Riyadh, Omani port hit by drones; US base in Bahrain targeted
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
Saudi Defence Ministry says a fire broke out at the embassy, while media reported a drone attack on Oman's Duqm port.

item.title: IHH Healthcare Malaysia Marks Third Consecutive Year in Newsweek’s World’s Best Hospitals 2026 Rankings
item.description:
Source: CodeBlue (Malaysia Health)
The continued recognition reflects governance systems that are firmly established across its hospitals, with patient safety and care standards applied consistently across specialties and services. The post IHH Healthcare Malaysia Marks Third Consecutive Year in Newsweek’s World’s Best Hospitals 2026 Rankings appeared first on CodeBlue .

item.title: US kamikaze drone found on farmland in Iraq
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
An unexploded US kamikaze drone was found on farmland in Western Iraq on Monday.

item.title: Expert: Gradually Replace PTDs In MOH With Public Health, Allied Health Professionals
item.description:
Source: CodeBlue (Malaysia Health)
A public health medicine specialist (PHMS) wants a study to identify MOH's admin posts held by PTDs that can be gradually filled by PHMS or allied health professionals trained in health system management. PTDs are still relevant in some areas in HQ/state. The post Expert: Gradually Replace PTDs In MOH With Public Health, Allied Health Professionals appeared first on CodeBlue .

item.title: Cursor has reportedly surpassed $2B in annualized revenue
item.description:
Source: TechCrunch
The four-year-old startup saw its revenue run rate double over the past three months, according to one Bloomberg source.

item.title: How much could the Iran war cost the US? Here’s what we know
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
Predicting the total cost of the campaign is difficult, and experts warn the greater challenge may be inventory.

item.title: Golestan Palace majorly damaged in US-Israeli strikes on Tehran
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
Tehran's historic Golestan Palace, a UNESCO World Heritage site, has sustained major damage after US-Israeli strikes.

item.title: Six more children held under Sosma, Suaram urges immediate release
item.description:
Source: Malaysiakini (EN News)
UPDATED 3.11PM | Human rights group says this is a blatant disregard of child rights.

item.title: India’s Pronto formalizes house help as its valuation jumps 8x in under a year
item.description:
Source: TechCrunch
Pronto handles 18,000 daily bookings and plans rapid expansion as it races rivals to digitize India's largely offline home services market.

item.title: SNAPSHOT | Rosmah fails in final bid to recuse judge; RON95 still RM1.99; MP fell ill before term-limit vote
item.description:
Source: Malaysiakini (EN News)
KINI SNAPSHOT | What's going on in the news today, with updates at 9am, 2pm, 6pm and 9pm.

item.title: Melania Trump chairs UN meeting on children days after Iran school strike
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
US First Lady Melania Trump has presided over a UN Security Council meeting focusing on children in conflict.

item.title: UN chief calls for ‘way out’ of Iran war
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
‘What is needed now in the region more than anything, is a way out.’

item.title: YOURSAY | What's wrong with using public relations to preserve good image?
item.description:
Source: Malaysiakini (EN News)
'Is this enough to be construed as trying to overthrow the govt?'

item.title: US’s Rubio tries to justify attacks on Iran as driven by self-defence
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
Marco Rubio has tried to justify the coordinated attacks with Israel on Iran since Saturday as driven by self-defence.

item.title: US urges citizens to immediately leave over a dozen Middle East countries
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
The latest advisory includes Egypt, Israel, Saudi Arabia and Qatar, according to a State Department official.

item.title: ChatGPT uninstalls surged by 295% after DoD deal
item.description:
Source: TechCrunch
Many consumers ditched ChatGPT's app after news of its DoD deal went live, while Claude's downloads grew.

item.title: Kajang temple questions S'gor govt's RM3m road plan, says 50m pathway enough
item.description:
Source: Malaysiakini (EN News)
Temple leader blames current MB, says no issues under predecessors.

item.title: Stripe wants to turn your AI costs into a profit center
item.description:
Source: TechCrunch
Stripe released a preview intended to allow AI companies to easily track, pass through, and make a profit on underlying AI model fees.

item.title: Geopolitical drama reportedly stalls IPO of SoftBank-backed PayPay
item.description:
Source: TechCrunch
The Japan-based company reportedly aimed for a public valuation of at least ¥1.5 trillion ($10 billion).

item.title: No one has a good plan for how AI companies should work with the government
item.description:
Source: TechCrunch
As OpenAI transitions from a wildly successful consumer startup into a piece of national security infrastructure, the company seems unequipped to manage its new responsibilities.

item.title: A new app alerts you if someone nearby is wearing smart glasses
item.description:
Source: TechCrunch
A hobbyist developer's new app, which can detect nearby smart glasses, comes amid resistance to always-on recording and listening devices that invade people's privacy.

item.title: Anthropic upgrades Claude’s memory to attract AI switchers
item.description:
Source: The Verge
Anthropic is making it easier to switch to its Claude AI from other chatbots with an update that brings Claude's memory feature to users on the free plan, along with a new prompt and dedicated tool for importing data from other chatbots. These upgrades could allow users who have been using rivals like OpenAI's ChatGPT […]

item.title: Instagram tracked growing usage while targeting teens, lawyers argue
item.description:
Source: TechCrunch
The company said usage grew from 40 minutes per day in 2023 to 46 minutes in 2026. Other documents referenced teens as being a top priority for the app before asking existing users for birthdays.

item.title: Apple’s cheapest AirPods have hit $89
item.description:
Source: The Verge
It’s a good day for Apple fans on a budget. Not only did the company introduce a new budget phone, its entry-level AirPods 4 are also on sale. Right now, you can snag a pair of Apple’s AirPods 4 starting at just $89 ($30 off) at Walmart. The model with active noise-cancellation are also down […]

item.title: How the new iPhone 17E stacks up against Apple’s pricier phones
item.description:
Source: The Verge
The iPhone 17 lineup now has a “budget” option. Announced this week, the iPhone 17E will hit stores on Wednesday, March 11th, starting at $599, with preorders opening on March 4th. The 6.1-inch phone joins the rest of Apple’s iPhone 17 lineup, which includes the iPhone 17 ($799), the more powerful iPhone 17 Pro ($1,099), […]

item.title: Apple might use Google servers to store data for its upgraded AI Siri
item.description:
Source: The Verge
Apple has asked Google to look into "setting up servers" for a new version of Siri that's Gemini-powered and meets Apple's privacy requirements, The Information reports. Apple had already announced in January that Google's Gemini AI models would help power the upgraded version of Siri it delayed last year, but The Information's report indicates Apple […]

item.title: Mastodon now has a button for sharing content from other websites
item.description:
Source: The Verge
Sharing content to Mastodon is getting easier with the addition of a universal "Share to Mastodon" button for the decentralized social media platform. Announced on Monday, the widget allows users to share content on any Mastodon server by connecting your Mastodon account and redirecting you to the server that account is on. The blog post […]

item.title: You could be an influencer without even realizing it
item.description:
Source: The Verge
In late February, Puck reported on a strange case: An influencer with more than a million followers was inadvertently promoting products on Instagram. On some of Julia Berolzheimer's posts, a "Shop the look" button hovered in the corner. When followers clicked it, they were fed similar items to what Berolzheimer was wearing. Her job is […]

item.title: Users are ditching ChatGPT for Claude — here’s how to make the switch
item.description:
Source: TechCrunch
Following controversies surrounding ChatGPT, many users are ditching the AI chatbot for Claude instead. Here's how to make the switch.

item.title: Paramount+ and HBO Max to merge into one streaming service after WBD deal closes
item.description:
Source: TechCrunch
Ellison reassured investors that HBO’s identity and creative vision as a studio would remain unchanged, stating, “Our viewpoint is HBO should stay HBO.”

item.title: Donut Lab’s solid-state battery can handle the (extreme) heat, test says
item.description:
Source: The Verge
Finnish startup Donut Lab is out to prove that its solid-state battery is all that it claims to be. Last week, the test was about fast charging. This week is where things get hot. Like the first test, this one was also conducted by state-owned VTT Technical Research Centre of Finland. The team set out […]

item.title: AI-generated art can’t be copyrighted after Supreme Court declines to review the rule
item.description:
Source: The Verge
The US Supreme Court has declined to hear a case over whether AI-generated art can obtain a copyright, as reported earlier by Reuters. The Monday decision comes after Stephen Thaler, a computer scientist from Missouri, appealed a court's decision to uphold a ruling that found AI-generated art can't be copyrighted. In 2019, the US Copyright […]

item.title: Here’s the upgrade to my favorite phone camera of last year
item.description:
Source: The Verge
Vivo rarely has a presence at MWC, but this year it bucked that trend in a big way, with the reveal of its next flagship phone, the X300 Ultra, alongside an upgraded telephoto extender lens and professional camera cage. The company isn't ready to launch the handset just yet - or even reveal very many […]

item.title: Tech workers urge DOD, Congress to withdraw Anthropic label as a supply-chain risk
item.description:
Source: TechCrunch
Tech workers have signed an open letter urging the Department of Defense to withdraw its designation of Anthropic as a "supply chain risk" and instead to settle the matter quietly.
